commands.review_summary:
The PR hardens package-update handoff by preserving legacy config metadata, falling back to npm when ClawHub artifacts are unavailable, and targeting managed service package roots during updates.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level contracts: current main defers configured-plugin repair when only the parent-support marker is present, and the package-root path does not yet honor direct managed roots. I did not establish a live package-update reproduction path.
commands.review_followup: The protected label and missing real behavior proof require maintainer handling rather than a ClawSweeper repair job.

target.title: fix(update): harden legacy package handoff
target.body:
## Summary
- Keep legacy package-update doctor repairs old-parent-readable by preserving source config metadata while still allowing modern parents to defer plugin package repair explicitly.
- Fall back to npm when ClawHub package metadata exists but the ClawPack artifact download is unavailable.
- Target the managed gateway service package root during package updates and honor direct `node_modules` roots without breaking ordinary npm bin shim refreshes.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor/shared/update-phase.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/release-configured-plugin-installs.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/plugins/clawhub.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.test.ts src/commands/onboarding-plugin-install.test.ts src/infra/update-global.test.ts src/infra/package-update-steps.test.ts src/cli/update-cli.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose` (9 files, 322 tests)
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --reviewer codex --fallback-reviewer none` (clean after fixup)
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm check:changed` (Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01krwf9bgences8s6jt9zv0zvd`, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26010618814)

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: legacy package updates from an old parent can run candidate doctor repairs without future-stamping config metadata, ClawHub artifact 404s can fall back to npm, and package updates target the managed service package root instead of the invoking checkout/root.
Real environment tested: Blacksmith Testbox changed core/coreTests/docs lanes; local focused Vitest for update, doctor, ClawHub, and package-target contracts.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: the commands listed in Verification.
Evidence after fix: focused tests passed; autoreview returned no actionable findings; Testbox `tbx_01krwf9bgences8s6jt9zv0zvd` exited 0.
Observed result after fix: changed lanes passed, legacy metadata override is covered, direct npm node_modules swapping is covered, ordinary npm shim refresh remains covered, and ClawHub artifact-missing fallback is covered.
What was not tested: full Package Acceptance published-upgrade-survivor lane from beta.4 to this PR package was not run.
target.author: steipete
